{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Malice's bloodline armor
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozmanthus]]'s appearance in ancient armor reminded [[Lindon]] of [[Malice]]’s [[bloodline armor]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
